mapper.select:
/* ess 충방전량 합계 조회 */ select sum(chg_val_sum) as chg_val_sum, sum(dischg_val_sum) as dischg_val_sum, sum(ess_revenue_sum) as ess_revenue_sum from ( select ifnull( sum(chg_val), 0) as chg_val_sum, ifnull( sum(dischg_val), 0) as dischg_val_sum, 0 as ess_revenue_sum from tb_ess_charge where 1=1
and date_format(std_date,'%Y%m%d') = left(#{selTermFrom }, 8)
and date_format(std_date,'%Y%m') = left(#{selTermFrom }, 6)
and date_format(std_date,'%Y') = left(#{selTermFrom }, 4)
union
select 0 as chg_val_sum, 0 as dischg_val_sum, ifnull( sum(ess_chg_incen+ess_dischg_incen), 0 ) as ess_revenue_sum from tb_bill where 1=1
and bill_yearm = left(#{selTermFrom }, 8)
and bill_yearm = left(#{selTermFrom }, 6)
and left(bill_yearm, 4) = left(#{selTermFrom }, 4)
) a
